metadata.description: codegraph — cross-repo call graph in an embedded SQLite file (no daemon), exposed to Claude as MCP tools.

plugins.name: codegraph
plugins.description: Index a project into a cross-repo call graph (embedded SQLite, no daemon or JVM) exposed as MCP tools, so Claude navigates/audits/refactors code at ~40-60% fewer tokens than grep+Read. Project-scoped, balanced auto-update, self-refresh via update_graph. /codegraph-init to start.
